    Automation Lab: Guide-student network

    A big red circle represents the guide, and all the nodes (in same colour) attached to it, represent their students. Path colour: current Ph.D. student; Dotted path: graduated Ph.D. student.

    Fun to do : Try hovering your mouse pointer on the nodes and try dragging the nodes while holding it.

    Note: The following network only comprises of recent (Graduating batch: >= 2016) students.

    The network is built with D3.js.
